---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability, use case, or integration for VanGuard
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What you want to do**
The DFIR task or workflow you are trying to accomplish that VanGuard does not
currently support.

**Proposed capability**
What VanGuard would need to do. If it is a new use case, describe the artifacts or
steps involved. If it is a new tool integration, name the tool and its purpose.

**Platform**
Windows, Linux, or both.

**Alternatives**
How you handle this today without VanGuard, if at all.
